name: cave-living
summary: A natural living cave — damp, mineral, unoccupied by humanoids but full of subterranean life. Stalagmites, pools, moss, mushroom colonies. The kind of place something might come to.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: irregular — can be long and winding or a single wide chamber

primary_palette.note: cave pool at the low point, ringed with dripstone
mineral feature — vein of crystals catching stray light
dense stalagmite floor — the chamber's defining feature

story_prompts: pristine — no one has been here in centuries, a true wild cave
bioluminescent mushroom bloom — the whole chamber glows blue-green
flooded — the pool has risen, half the chamber is knee-deep water
something lives here — no nest visible, but tracks circle the pool
a vein of something valuable is exposed in the wall, half-worked by unknown tools

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: cave-dark — truly dark; bioluminescence is the only natural exception

anti_patterns: no structure, no furniture, no humanoid trace
the pool should be at a natural low point, not centered for symmetry
stalagmites rise from floor, stalactites hang from ceiling — don't mix them as ground props
avoid dense prop coverage — caves have breathing room between features
